info.name: Sportig Django — Full Test Suite
info.description:
Comprehensive test suite for Sportig Django
Base URL: http://127.0.0.1:8000

IMPORTANT: Before running:
1. Run "1 — Setup" first to get CSRF token
2. Run "2 — Authentication > POST Login" to get session
3. Set product_slug variable to a real product slug from your database
4. Set product_id and variant_id to real IDs from Admin panel
